content.en:
Although Ye Tian's second deity had reached the realm of Tianzun, Ye Tian knew very well that with his current strength, if he dared to distort time and space and try to resurrect people, he would definitely backfire to death.

"Forget it, the strength of this second deity is weaker, but it is also equivalent to the combat power of the top Tianzun, first refine the Desolate Lord Order, and then enter the Desolate Realm, you should be able to control the Desolate Realm!"

Ye Tian pondered.

Immediately, he took out the Desolate Lord Order and began to refine the second deity.

"Next, let the main body fall asleep first, and control the second deity with all your might!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, his main body began to sleep, and his consciousness was all focused on the second deity.

"Start refining!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Under the refining of Ye Tian's second deity Tianzun realm, the Desolate Lord Order was refined little by little.

In the blink of an eye, years have passed.

this day.

The Desolate Lord Order was successfully preliminarily refined by Ye Tian, but now Ye Tian is not the Realm Lord of the Desolate Realm, he can only be regarded as half of the Realm Lord.

If you want to become a Realm Master, you must enter the Wasteland and let the Wasteland Master Order successfully control the origin of the Wasteland, so that you can become the Wasteland Realm Master.

But before he becomes the realm master, those innate gods in the desolate realm will definitely come to stop him, and there will definitely be a big war at that time.

Although Ye Tian can use the Desolate Lord's Order to mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, and he is enough to exert a powerful and supreme combat power in the Desolate Realm, such combat power may not be able to persist until he successfully controls the Desolate Realm.

"The realm of my Chaos Avenue has reached the extreme of the Dharma Phase, although the second deity cannot fit the Chaos Avenue as well as the deity, but it can also comprehend the Chaos Dao, and improve the realm of the Chaos Avenue in a short period of time as much as possible, and then supplemented by the Chaos True Technique Battle, it should be able to have a lot of combat power, plus the Tiangang battle method can also be used on the second deity, so the hope is greater. "

Ye Tian thought.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian began to use the second deity to comprehend the Chaos Dao.

However, with a different body, Ye Tian found that it was very difficult to comprehend the Chaos Dao, this body seemed to be incompatible with the Chaos Dao, even if he used the water of the Great Dao, it was useless.

Because this body is only the second Buddha-figure, and it is the second Buddha-figure cultivated with the use of the Supreme Treasure, it is still different from the real living beings in terms of cultivation.

However, after all, Ye Tian had already comprehended the Chaos Dao to the extreme of the Law Aspect Realm, so it was not impossible to recover to the extreme of the Law Aspect Realm, it was just a little troublesome.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

Under Ye Tian's full comprehension, the second deity not only stepped into the threshold of the Chaos Dao, but also reached the extreme of the Dharma Realm.

But at this time, Ye Tian also had a feeling that the second deity would never be able to enter the origin realm, because from the beginning, the foundation of this body on the Chaos Avenue was not stable, and the path was a little crooked.

Ye Tian also knew the reason, he was in too much of a hurry, just to quickly improve his strength, regardless of the foundation, but this was also something that could not be helped.

He didn't have much time to squander, and he had to improve his strength in a short period of time.

"The result is good, the combat power of the second deity should be infinitely close to the supreme now, if you use the desolate master order to control the power of the desolate realm, it is definitely comparable to the top supreme, even if it can't match that desolate venerable, it will not be killed in seconds, and it can definitely persist until the moment when you control the desolate realm!" Ye Tian said.

"It's time to go to the Wasteland, but this time, for the sake of safety, I didn't bring my body into it. Once you control the wasteland, you can bring the main body into it when the time comes!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Immediately, Ye Tian's second deity was sent out of the Holy City and the Terran territory by Ye Tian, otherwise if a strange Celestial Venerable was wandering in the Terran territory, it would be easy for the Supremes to find out and kill him.

Ye Tian didn't want the second deity he had finally made up to die in the hands of his own family, wouldn't that be a big loss!

Outside of Terran territory.

Ye Tian's second deity appeared here, and immediately took a spaceship to shuttle to the location of the wasteland.

Along the way, Ye Tian avoided the territories of some big clans, and only passed through some small clan territories and barren areas.

A few days later, Ye Tian finally came to the area where the Wasteland was located.

At this time, the wasteland is very calm, and the desolate world, which has always been low-key, has long been forgotten by all races, and the supremes of the twelve universe epochs have not set their sights on the desolate world.

Therefore, there are no strong people outside the wasteland at this time.

"The Wasteland prohibits the strong from entering, if it is other supremes, they can't enter the Wasteland at all, but I have the Wasteland Master's Order in my hand, and the prohibition of the Wasteland is not effective against me at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he flew in front of the barrier of the Wasteland World with the Wasteland Master Order in his hand, and then stepped into the interior of the Wasteland.

-----------

Wasteland.

In an unfamiliar mountain range, the figure of Ye Tian's second deity emerged.

"Come in!"

Ye Tiandao.

At this time, after refining the Desolate Master's Order, he obviously sensed that the power of the Desolate Realm surrounded him, and he could control the power of the Desolate Realm, and he didn't know how many times more than the Desolate Power controlled by the Desolate Pattern talent!

"This is the real power to control the desolate realm, the desolate talent is just a talent that was accidentally born by the desolate demon created by the desolate venerable, it is nothing. Now that I'm in the Wasteland, I can't find it. But once I completely activate the Desolate Lord Order and try to control the Desolate Realm, then the Desolate Venerable and other supreme-level innate gods will definitely know!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After pondering for a while, Ye Tian still decided to activate the Desolate Lord's Order.

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian completely inspired the Desolate Lord's Order.

Rumble!!!!

The Desolate Master Order turned into a huge ball of light, communicating with the origin of the Desolate Realm, and was invading the Desolate Origin step by step, once the Desolate Lord Order completely controlled the Desolate Origin Order, it was equivalent to Ye Tian controlling the Desolate Origin Origin.

At that time, he could suppress the creatures in the Wasteland with a single thought, unless the power of that existence could resist the Wasteland, or forcibly break the Wasteland, there would be no way to resist Ye Tian.

Meanwhile.

In the middle of the wasteland, in the midst of an ancient temple.

A body that had not moved for 10,000 years suddenly moved.

This man was dressed in an ancient animal skin robe, exuding an ancient aura and golden veins on his body.

He is the creator of the Desolate Demon Clan-Desolate Venerable.

"The breath of the Wild Lord's Order, someone is trying to control the Wild Realm, who is it?"

Aramazun was furious.

He has always wanted to get the Wasteland Order, but he can't get it again and again, but he didn't expect that now the Wasteland Lord's Order has been born.

"Could it be that when I was in retreat, a certain innate god received the order of the Lord of the Wasteland in the Wasteland Tower, and is now preparing to take control of the Wasteland. Hmph, looking for death, it's me who ordered the desolate lord!"

Aramazun flew out of the temple and shuttled towards the place where the Wild Lord's aura was.

In addition to the Desolate Venerable, some other supreme-level innate gods in the Desolate Realm also came out of the customs one after another and went to the place where Ye Tian was.

As for those innate gods with weaker strength, although they didn't dare to come over, they also threw their divine senses one after another.

An amazing battle is coming!
